---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the website
title: 'Feature: [Brief description]'
labels: ['enhancement', 'feature-request']
assignees: ['AlaaEmam29']
---

## ✨ Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->


## 🎯 Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What need does it address? -->


## 💡 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented -->


## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->


## 📋 Feature Type
- [ ] **UI/UX Improvement** - Better user interface or experience
- [ ] **Search & Navigation** - Improved search or navigation features
- [ ] **Resource Management** - Better ways to organize or display resources
- [ ] **Accessibility** - Features to improve accessibility
- [ ] **Performance** - Speed or performance improvements
- [ ] **Mobile Experience** - Mobile-specific improvements
- [ ] **Content Features** - New ways to present or interact with content
- [ ] **Developer Experience** - Improvements for contributors/developers

## 🎨 Mockups or Examples
<!-- If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples of similar features -->


## 📱 Platform Considerations
- [ ] **Desktop** - Feature should work on desktop browsers
- [ ] **Mobile** - Feature should work on mobile devices
- [ ] **Tablet** - Feature should work on tablet devices
- [ ] **All Platforms** - Feature should work across all platforms

## 📊 Success Criteria
<!-- How will we know this feature is successful? What metrics or outcomes should we measure? -->


## 📋 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, research, or information about the feature request -->


---
**Implementation Priority:**
- [ ] **Low** - Nice to have, not urgent
- [ ] **Medium** - Would significantly improve user experience
- [ ] **High** - Important for project goals
- [ ] **Critical** - Essential for project success
